summary: Worked on backend systems across microservices and real-time enterprise workflows, with project details kept client-agnostic.
highlights: Developed a FastAPI-based microservice to orchestrate distributed document workflows.
Built event-driven backend pipelines for extraction, validation, and report generation using asynchronous processing.
Implemented secure upload and cloud-processing flows using pre-signed URLs, queues, and serverless components.
Contributed to a real-time communication and workflow platform with WebSocket-based updates and backend performance optimizations.
Developed a Business Workflow Management System in ASP.NET MVC.
Implemented role-based user management and automated bulk import/export workflows.
Designed responsive internal dashboards for process tracking.
